title: 2024 Annual Cost of the Clean Fuel Standard: Washington Department of Ecology Estimates CFS Raised Average Gasoline by $0.0059 in 2024
content:
The Washington Department of Ecology is required to estimate the average cost or cost savings per gallon of gasoline or diesel attributable to the CFS each year. This analysis
estimates possible impacts from Jan. 1, 2024 through Dec. 31, 2024, and indicates that the CFS may have raised the price of the average gallon of gasoline by less than a penny in 2024 â€“ $0.0059 â€“ and reduced more than an estimated 2.8 million metric tons of CO2e.
author: Analysts Account
